working: spotifyRateLimitUntil: module-level flag, set on any 429 in bg queue or fetchTrackGenres
processLibraryTrackInBackground: skips immediately if rate limited (no more log flood)
fetchTrackGenres: sets flag + returns [] on 429 (no blocking delay)
bg queue token: uses spotifyUserToken || getSpotifyToken()

REQUIRES MANUAL SQL: ALTER TABLE projects ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS reference_links jsonb DEFAULT '[]';
Spotify user token is in-memory only — resets on watcher restart; OAuth flow must be re-run after each restart

notes: Rate limit flag persists in memory — bg queue will self-resume once Date.now() > spotifyRateLimitUntil on the next queue iteration.
